title: Mighty Moist Venezuelan Ham Empanadas
description: A jammy and fluffy Venezuelan dish featuring ham and render fat, perfect for a keto friendly meal
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit
In a large bowl, mix together the almond flour, mozzarella cheese, and eggs to form a dough
Add the melted render fat, salt, and black pepper to the dough and mix until well combined
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces and roll each piece into a ball
Flatten each ball into a disk shape and place a tablespoon of diced pork ham in the center of each disk
Fold the dough over the ham to form a half moon shape and press the edges together to seal
Place the empanadas on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and brush with a little bit of melted render fat
Bake the empanadas in the preheated oven for 20 minutes, or until golden brown
